name: Pyromania
short_description: Pyromania is an action-packed horde survival game. Strategy and movement are key to surviving the ever-growing hordes of zombies, wild animals and other monsters. It can be played either solo or in online-coop with up to 4 players.
detailed_description:
"Foul beasts of fire and sin, the lord has called upon your dire awakening. It seems to protect what is holy all means are to be condoned. Even those considered heretical..."

Gameplay
Pyromania is an action-packed horde survival game in which the player gets to control a fire-breathing werewolf (as usual). It can be played either solo or in online-coop with up to 4 players. Strategy and movement are key to surviving the ever-growing hordes of zombies, wild animals and other monsters. It is also the player's job to carefully invest in their character's strength throughout a run to keep up with the enemies' increasing power.

Key Features
- Online-coop, up to 4 players
- Horde survival with growing difficulty
- Character Min-Maxing
- Cross-run-progression
- Easy to pick up
- High skill ceiling
- Global leaderboards
- Movement and positioning are key
- Knowledge and strategy are also key
- Random events make every run unique

supported_languages: English, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Japanese, Korean
